metrics.label: Distinct Encounters
metrics.description: Number of distinct ED encounters in the slice.

metrics.label: Average Acuity
metrics.description: Mean ESI triage score (1 = most acute, 5 = least). Lower values indicate a sicker case mix.

metrics.label: ED Length of Stay
metrics.description: Arrival → Exit. Mean minutes per encounter.

metrics.label: Arrival → Triage
metrics.description: Time from ED arrival to triage start. Includes ambulance offload when EMS-arrived.

metrics.label: Triage → In-Room
metrics.description: Waiting-room time after triage before bed placement.

metrics.label: In-Room → MD
metrics.description: Time from arriving at the bed to first MD evaluation.

metrics.label: MD → Disposition
metrics.description: Time from first MD encounter to disposition decision.

metrics.label: Disposition → Exit
metrics.description: Time from disposition decision to patient leaving the ED. A.k.a. Boarding Time for admitted patients.

metrics.label: Door-to-MD
metrics.description: Arrival → first MD evaluation. Composite of Arrival→Triage + Triage→In-Room + In-Room→MD.

metrics.label: Door-to-Disposition
metrics.description: Arrival → disposition order.

metrics.label: Boarding Time
metrics.description: Disposition → Exit. The time after a disposition is placed but before the patient physically leaves. Admit-bound patients dominate this.

metrics.label: Disposition → Decision-to-Admit
metrics.description: Time between the final disposition timestamp and the decision to admit.

metrics.label: Decision-to-Admit → Admit Order Written
metrics.description: Provider-side time between deciding to admit and writing the admission order.

metrics.label: Admit Order → Bed Request
metrics.description: Order written to bed-request submitted to inpatient placement.

metrics.label: Bed Request → Bed Assigned
metrics.description: Inpatient team time to assign a bed.

metrics.label: Bed Assigned → Bed Ready
metrics.description: Room turnover time after assignment.

metrics.label: Bed Ready → Exit
metrics.description: Transport time from bed-ready notification to ED departure.

metrics.label: Ambulance Offload Time
metrics.description: EMS arrival → triage. Measures how long ambulances are held before patient care is transferred. Target ≤ 20 min. Computed only on EMS transports (AMBULANCE / HELICOPTER / FIRE DEPARTMENT).

metrics.label: % Ambulance Offload > 20 min
metrics.description: Share of EMS transports where offload exceeded 20 min.

metrics.label: Left Without Being Seen
metrics.description: LWBS rate — patients who left before being seen by a provider. Denominator is all encounters.

metrics.label: Left Before Treatment Complete
metrics.description: LBTC rate — patients who left during treatment.

metrics.label: Against Medical Advice
metrics.description: AMA departure rate.

metrics.label: 72-hour Return
metrics.description: Any-cause ED return by same MRN within 72 hours. Denominator: encounters that reached a provider.

metrics.label: 7-day Return
metrics.description: Any-cause ED return within 7 days. Denominator: encounters that reached a provider.

metrics.label: 30-day Return
metrics.description: Any-cause ED return within 30 days. Denominator: encounters that reached a provider.

metrics.label: Admit Rate
metrics.description: Share of encounters admitted to inpatient service.

metrics.label: Transfer Rate
metrics.description: Share of encounters transferred to another facility or service.

metrics.label: Mortality Rate
metrics.description: ED expired rate.
